title: Fix stale dev recordit.exe selection
description: GUI dev mode is selecting an older release binary without new run flags. Prefer debug binary in dev and rebuild Windows CLI in dev script.

title: Wire Windows helper path for debug CLI launches
description: ASR jobs all fail because debug recordit.exe has no sibling whisper-cli.exe. Set RECORDIT_WHISPERCPP_CLI_PATH to target/release/whisper-cli.exe when launching from GUI if debug helper is missing.

title: Implement low-latency live transcript UX in Tauri GUI
description: Match upstream-style transcript presentation with rolling partial preview and expose runtime tuning flags for faster live transcript updates.

title: T-008: Windows CLI docs + support boundary
description: Update README.md and docs/operator-quickstart.md to clearly state Windows=CLI lane, macOS=GUI-first lane. Add Windows CLI quickstart with install/build/run/preflight/troubleshoot steps. No overclaiming GUI parity.

title: T-001: Windows CI compile gate (cargo check MSVC x64)
description: Add a GitHub Actions workflow that runs `cargo check --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc` for bins recordit and transcribe-live. Must pass on PR. File impact: .github/workflows/windows-cli-ci.yml, Cargo.toml.

title: T-007: Windows CLI artifact lane (zip + smoke)
description: Add GitHub Actions Windows job that builds and zips CLI artifacts. Include smoke steps: recordit.exe --help, transcribe-live.exe --help. Upload zip artifact. File impact: .github/workflows/windows-cli-ci.yml (extend), scripts/ if needed.

title: T-006: Windows canonical runtime layout for backend helpers
description: Document and test canonical Windows release layout: recordit.exe + transcribe-live.exe + whisper-cli.exe in bin/ sibling. Add test for resolve_backend_program against this layout. File impact: src/bin/transcribe_live/asr_backend.rs, docs/transcribe-operator-runbook.md.

title: T-004: Windows degradation/recovery event contract parity
description: Ensure Windows capture path emits CaptureEventCode and CaptureRecoveryAction events matching the shared contract. Add regression test for at least one interruption/failure path. File impact: src/win_capture.rs, src/live_capture.rs, src/capture_api.rs.

title: Ignore Linux recordit artifact on Windows
description: Windows GUI must not select target/debug/recordit (ELF) left by WSL. Restrict Windows binary lookup to recordit.exe only.

title: T-005: Windows preflight remediation guidance hardening
description: Harden Windows preflight error messages for: missing render device, mic unavailable/disabled, backend helper not in PATH. Ensure messages are Windows-specific and actionable. File impact: src/bin/transcribe_live/preflight.rs, src/bin/transcribe_live/app.rs.

title: T-003: Replace Windows capture telemetry all-zero placeholder
description: Replace all-zero placeholder transport stats in run_streaming_capture_session_windows (live_capture.rs:2476). Wire real stats from win_capture ring. Add test confirming summary not all-zero. File impact: src/win_capture.rs, src/live_capture.rs, src/capture_api.rs.

title: Remove unused Command import in recordit_cli
description: Clean up warning from recordit_cli.rs by removing the unused std::process::Command import.

title: Prefer workspace CLI over stale sibling in Tauri dev
description: Tauri dev may leave an old sibling recordit.exe next to gui.exe. In dev layouts, resolve workspace target/debug/recordit.exe before sibling executable.

title: Implement stable partial transcript promotion for live UI
description: Add stable_prefix reducer in live transcript event pipeline, introduce stable_partial event, update transcript display/GUI, and verify no duplicate final text while capture continues.

title: T-002: Windows test matrix baseline (lib + Windows branch tests)
description: Add regression tests for: (1) backend helper resolution with .exe suffix on Windows, (2) preflight branch for target_os=windows. CI must run cargo test --lib on Windows runner. File impact: src/bin/transcribe_live/asr_backend.rs, src/bin/transcribe_live/preflight.rs, tests/.
